title: AXE PVP PACK
description: A PvP-focused resource pack designed for axe combat, featuring custom axe, sword, bow, and crossbow textures, plus a side shield for better visibility during fights.
body:
[AXE PVP PACK] is an axe PvP–focused resource pack that changes weapon textures to improve clarity and visibility during combat.

This pack redesigns axes, swords, bows, crossbows, and includes a side shield texture to keep more of the screen visible while blocking — making it ideal for competitive PvP.

⚔️ Features

Axe PvP textures optimized for fast combat

Clean sword textures for clear hit timing

Improved bow textures for easier aiming

Sharp crossbow textures with a competitive look

Side shield texture for better visibility while blocking

Consistent PvP-oriented style across all weapons

🎯 Why use this pack?

This resource pack is made for players who focus on axe PvP and competitive fights.
It reduces visual clutter and helps you keep track of weapons and shield usage during intense combat.

Great for:

Axe PvP

Duels

PvP servers

Practice and competitive play
